goal: Implement 'gad assets list' against Supabase. Reads env (SUPABASE_URL + SERVICE_ROLE_KEY or ANON_KEY from .env / shell), constructs a @supabase/supabase-js server client, queries the assets table with optional --project / --species / --generation filters, renders columnar table via lib/table.cjs render helper. Handles empty results. Honors --json for machine-readable output. Does NOT implement upload/download/move/transfer — those stay as not-implemented placeholders from 71-01. Tests: mock supabase client, verify query shape + table output + --json path. Follow-up task for upload/download/move/transfer = 71-03.
